intro: Stir Up Some Magic in Your Very Own Potion Empire!
description:
Welcome to the most enchanting workshop in the kingdom! Are you ready to turn a humble garden into a bustling, bubbling business? In this cozy management adventure, you’ll step into the paws (or ears!) of a talented alchemist determined to brew the best eliksirs in the land.

Meet Your Furry Founders
Choose your hero! Play as a clever Cat or a spunky Rabbit. While you’re busy in the lab, your partner handles the local Bazaar, stocking up on seeds and essentials. Together, you’ll manage three vibrant locations: the bustling Bazaar, the tranquil Farmlands, and your high-tech Alchemy Laboratory.

Are you ready to become the ultimate Alchemist? Grab your apron—it’s time to get brewing!

Features to Enchant You:
- 50 Levels of Progression: Watch your empire grow from a small shed to a massive production line.
- Cozy Vibes: Start your day at your own pace. Prep your shop in the morning sun before the doors open and the rush begins.
- Deep Customization: Choose which upgrades to prioritize to fit your playstyle.
- Endless Fun: Even after hitting level 50, the challenge continues as orders get more complex and your factory reaches peak efficiency.
